title: Senior Software Engineer
achievements: Designed and deployed a Python-based sales forecasting pipeline using scikit-learn and PyTorch, improving production forecast accuracy by 13% through structured feature engineering and retraining stabilization.

Delivered React-based forecasting dashboards integrated with FastAPI and Node.js APIs, lowering production latency by 16% through database indexing and Redis caching.
